ol.li: Checksum field must be 0 during calculation.
Any modification to sequence or flags requires recalculation.
Payload length must match 'length' field exactly.

ul.li: CRC32 is Little-Endian when stored in the entry.
The flags field (Offset 02) includes an is_compressed bit which alters the data range.
Checksum field zeroed to prevent circular dependency during hash calculation

div.p: Calculate CRC32 over the binary representation of the header and payload, skipping the 4 bytes reserved for the checksum itself.
The calculated digest is written into the checksum field. The entry is now self-consistent and ready for persistence.
Read raw bytes from disk into volatile buffer. Run same CRC32 algorithm on the range [0..15] and [20..N].
Compare computed value against the value stored at offset 16. Abort transaction on mismatch.
